hooks.command:
node -e 'const fs=require("fs"),path=require("path");const dir=path.join(process.cwd(),"handoff");let files=[];try{files=fs.readdirSync(dir).filter(f=>/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}_summary\.md$/.test(f)).sort();}catch{}let parts=[];const nextPath=path.join(dir,"NEXT.md");try{const nextContent=fs.readFileSync(nextPath,"utf8");parts.push("Open follow-up items (handoff/NEXT.md):

"+nextContent);}catch{}if(files.length>0){const latest=files[files.length-1];const content=fs.readFileSync(path.join(dir,latest),"utf8");parts.push("Most recent handoff summary ("+latest+"):

"+content);}if(parts.length===0){process.exit(0);}console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"SessionStart",additionalContext:parts.join("

---

")}}));' 2>/dev/null || true
